home.title: Welcome
home.text: Welcome to my professional profile. Here you will find my values, leadership approach, experience, and a clear presentation of who I am as a leader in the pharmaceutical industry.

about.title: About
about.text: Bilingual strategic leader (FR/EN) with over 15 years of experience in the pharmaceutical and biotechnology industry. I specialize in behavioral transformation, sustainable commercial performance, and developing autonomy within teams operating in complex scientific environments. I combine rigor, scientific credibility, and human-centered leadership to build accountable, autonomous teams capable of delivering predictable results.

qa.title: Q&A
qa.intro: A section dedicated to frequent questions about my approach, values, vision, and way of working.

items.question: What is your leadership philosophy?
items.answer: I believe results are a direct reflection of individual behaviors. My role is to develop autonomy, strategic thinking, and accountability rather than impose control. I lead through questioning to elevate standards and make performance predictable.

items.question: How do you support teams in complex scientific environments?
items.answer: I bring structure, rigor, and consistency. I simplify scientific complexity by translating it into concrete, measurable, and repeatable behaviors. My goal is to strengthen scientific credibility while maintaining disciplined commercial execution.

items.question: What sets you apart as a commercial leader?
items.answer: I focus on behavioral transformation rather than micro‑management. I combine commercial performance with scientific credibility, staying calm under pressure and committed to sustainable, long‑term results.

items.question: How do you develop autonomy and accountability within a team?
items.answer: I start by clarifying expectations, then use strategic questioning to help individuals think, decide, and act with intention. Autonomy drives sustainable performance, and accountability grows through trust and preparation.

items.question: How do you handle difficult situations or performance issues?
items.answer: With courage, transparency, and strategic empathy. I address issues quickly, clarify expected behaviors, and support the individual with a concrete, measurable improvement plan backed by rigorous coaching.

items.question: Which values guide your work every day?
items.answer: Integrity, excellence, courage, strategic empathy, and persistence. These values shape my decisions, my interactions, and the way I develop autonomous, credible, and high‑performing teams.

values.title: Values
values.integrity_text: I make decisions aligned with my principles, even when it is difficult. Integrity builds trust, and trust enables sustainable performance.
values.excellence_text: I aim for high, measurable, and repeatable standards. Excellence is not a one-time goal — it is a daily discipline.
values.courage_text: I address issues quickly, with transparency and respect. Courage enables clarity, progress, and transformation.
values.empathy_text: I understand people, their motivations, and their constraints while maintaining focus on objectives. Empathy is not complacency — it is a performance lever.
values.persistence_text: I maintain effort, rigor, and consistency, even in uncertainty. Persistence turns intentions into results.

leadership.title: Leadership
leadership.questioning_text: I develop autonomy by helping people think, decide, and act on their own. Strategic questioning builds accountability and sustainable performance.
leadership.clarity_text: I clarify expectations, required behaviors, and performance standards. Rigor is not control — it is a framework that enables autonomy.
leadership.predictability_text: I translate objectives into concrete, measurable, and repeatable behaviors. A high‑performing team is one that understands why it succeeds.
leadership.calm_text: I maintain a stable, rational, solution‑oriented posture, even in uncertainty. Calm is a multiplier of collective performance.
leadership.development_text: I create an environment where people can grow, stretch, and become autonomous. A leader’s role is to make others better.

experience.title: Experience
experience.years: 15+ years of experience in the pharmaceutical and biotechnology industry
experience.years_text: I have worked in complex environments where scientific credibility, commercial rigor, and the ability to influence multiple stakeholders are essential.
experience.behavior_text: I translate strategic objectives into concrete, measurable, and repeatable behaviors. This approach enables sustainable and predictable performance.
experience.leadership_text: I have led teams in demanding contexts, combining operational excellence, scientific understanding, and the development of autonomy.
experience.change_text: I support teams through transitions by clarifying expectations, strengthening accountability, and creating a framework that enables growth.
experience.coaching_text: I develop leaders who can think, decide, and act with intention. My approach is based on strategic questioning and empowerment.
